name: Namespace
description: Ephemeral remote dev environments + Docker builders + ephemeral Kubernetes (per-second billing). Build instances boot in under a second and have persistent BuildKit cache. The control plane API is gRPC-Web (Buf Connect) at api.namespace.so; this integration covers workload run/build/list operations.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Generate via `nsc auth exchange-github-token` or from cloud.namespace.so → Tokens

credential_fields.name: workspace_id
credential_fields.label: Workspace ID
credential_fields.description: Namespace workspace this token is scoped to (nscr.io/<workspace>)

tools.name: create_instance
tools.description: Boot an ephemeral instance (sub-second cold start). Args: machine_type (e.g. 2x4, 4x8, 8x16), os (ubuntu-22.04), features? (docker, kubernetes, github-runner), shape?.

tools.name: destroy_instance
tools.description: Terminate an instance immediately. Args: instance_id.

tools.name: list_builders
tools.description: List remote BuildKit builders attached to the workspace.

tools.name: ensure_buildkit
tools.description: Get or create a BuildKit builder for an architecture. Args: platform (linux/amd64 | linux/arm64), region?.

tools.name: list_clusters
tools.description: List ephemeral Kubernetes clusters in the workspace.
